title: Angraecoides egertonii
taxonomy: Angraecoides egertonii is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Angraecoides, which is a subgenus of the genus Angraecum. The exact classification can be broken down as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Genus: Angraecum, Subgenus: Angraecoides. Angraecoides egertonii is often considered a synonym for Angraecum egertonii. Further research may be necessary to confirm the most up-to-date classification.
